raw_sql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN amount < 500 THEN '1. <$500'
    WHEN amount < 1000 THEN '2. $500-999'
    WHEN amount < 2500 THEN '3. $1000-2499'
    WHEN amount < 5000 THEN '4. $2500-4999'
    WHEN amount < 10000 THEN '5. $5000-9999'
    ELSE '6. $10000+'
  END AS cost_bracket,
  COUNT(*) AS total_expenses,
  COUNT(processed_date) AS processed_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(processed_date) / COUNT(*), 1) AS processed_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0), 2) AS avg_days_to_process,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0), 2) AS median_days_to_process,
  ROUND(MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0), 2) AS min_days,
  ROUND(MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0), 2) AS max_days
FROM flag_22
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cost_bracket
ORDER BY cost_bracket;
template:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    ELSE ?s
  END AS cost_bracket,
  COUNT(*) AS total_expenses,
  COUNT(processed_date) AS processed_count,
  ROUND(?n * COUNT(processed_date) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS processed_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n), ?n) AS avg_days_to_process,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(?n) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n), ?n) AS median_days_to_process,
  ROUND(MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n), ?n) AS min_days,
  ROUND(MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n), ?n) AS max_days
FROM flag_22
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cost_bracket
ORDER BY cost_bracket;

    ELSE '6. $10000+'
  END AS cost_bracket,
  COUNT(*) AS total_expenses,
  COUNT(processed_date) AS processed_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(processed_date) / COUNT(*), 1) AS processed_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_days_to_process,
  ROUND((PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0))::numeric, 2) AS median_days_to_process,

WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cost_bracket
ORDER BY cost_bracket;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  department,
  CASE
    WHEN amount < 1000 THEN 'Low (<$1k)'
    WHEN amount < 5000 THEN 'Mid ($1k-4999)'
    ELSE 'High ($5k+)'
  END AS cost_tier,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0)::numeric, 1) AS avg_days
FROM flag_22
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department, cost_tier
ORDER BY department, cost_tier;
template:

  END AS cost_tier,
  COUNT(*) AS n,

FROM flag_22
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department, cost_tier
ORDER BY department, cost_tier;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  category,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN amount < 1000 THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0 END)::numeric, 1) AS avg_days_low,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN amount BETWEEN 1000 AND 4999 THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0 END)::numeric, 1) AS avg_days_mid,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN amount >= 5000 THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0 END)::numeric, 1) AS avg_days_high,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0)::numeric, 1) AS avg_days_overall
FROM flag_22
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY avg_days_overall DESC;
template:
SELECT
  category,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN amount < ?n THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n END)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_days_low,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN amount BETWEEN ?n AND ?n THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n END)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_days_mid,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN amount >= ?n THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n END)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_days_high,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_days_overall
FROM flag_22
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY avg_days_overall DESC;

SELECT
  (amount / 500) * 500 AS amount_bin_start,
  (amount / 500) * 500 + 499 AS amount_bin_end,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_days,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0)::numeric, 1) AS median_days
FROM flag_22
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY amount_bin_start
ORDER BY amount_bin_start;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN amount < 500 THEN '1. <$500'
    WHEN amount < 1000 THEN '2. $500-999'
    WHEN amount < 2500 THEN '3. $1000-2499'
    WHEN amount < 5000 THEN '4. $2500-4999'
    WHEN amount < 10000 THEN '5. $5000-9999'
  END AS cost_bracket,
  state,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY
    CASE
      WHEN amount < 500 THEN '1. <$500'
      WHEN amount < 1000 THEN '2. $500-999'
      WHEN amount < 2500 THEN '3. $1000-2499'
      WHEN amount < 5000 THEN '4. $2500-4999'
      WHEN amount < 10000 THEN '5. $5000-9999'
    END
  ), 1) AS pct_of_bracket
FROM flag_22
GROUP BY cost_bracket, state
ORDER BY cost_bracket, state;
template:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
  END AS cost_bracket,
  state,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY
    CASE
      WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
      WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
      WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
      WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
      WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
    END
  ), ?n) AS pct_of_bracket
FROM flag_22
GROUP BY cost_bracket, state
ORDER BY cost_bracket, state;

FROM flag_22
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL

LIMIT 60;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  amount,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0)::integer AS actual_days,
  CEIL(amount::numeric / 500)::integer AS predicted_ceil,
  ROUND(amount::numeric / 500 * 2 + 0.5)::integer AS predicted_formula,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0)::integer
    - CEIL(amount::numeric / 500)::integer AS residual
FROM flag_22
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY amount
LIMIT 50;
template:

  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n)::integer
    - CEIL(amount::numeric / ?n)::integer AS residual
FROM flag_22
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL

raw_sql:
SELECT
  ROUND(amount::numeric / 500) AS rounded_500_units,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_days,
  ROUND(STDDEV(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0)::numeric, 2) AS stddev_days,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / 86400.0)::numeric, 0) AS rounded_avg_days,
  ROUND(amount::numeric / 500) * 2 AS formula_2x_units
FROM flag_22
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ROUND(amount::numeric / 500)
ORDER BY ROUND(amount::numeric / 500);
template:

  COUNT(*) AS n,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_days,
  ROUND(STDDEV(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS stddev_days,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS rounded_avg_days,
  ROUND(amount::numeric / ?n) * ?n AS formula_2x_units
FROM flag_22
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ROUND(amount::numeric / ?n)
ORDER BY ROUND(amount::numeric / ?n);
